log_entries.thought_preview: The sample is a PE32 executable, has FTP communication capabilities, and uses persistence. It was analyzed in four different sandboxes. I'd like to know more about the network activity, registry chang

The sample communicated with one unique IP address and three unique domains, and dropped two files. It created one process and made a highlighted API call to SetFileTime. I'd like to know more about t

The sample communicated with the IP address 209.202.252.54 on port 21 (TCP) twice. It performed DNS lookups on three domains, but only one of them resolved to an IP address. I'd like to know more abou
The sample dropped two files, jusched.exe and C:\Program Files (x86)\71d2c87e\jusched.exe, with different SHA256 hashes. I'd like to know more about the registry changes.

The sample created two registry persistence keys to enable jusched.exe in the FirewallPolicy. This suggests that the sample is trying to maintain persistence on the system. I'd like to know more about

The sample created a process C:\Program Files\6c78a9fa\jusched.exe and loaded several notable modules, including api-ms-win-core-localregistry-l1-1-0.dll and mstask.dll. It also created no mutexes and

The sample exhibits several capabilities, including calculating modulo 256, delaying execution, enumerating files on Windows, and scheduling tasks via ITaskScheduler. These capabilities suggest that t
